summary.narrative: Leonardo Williams, educator and entrepreneur, elected Durham Mayor Nov 2023. Early tenure focused on downtown revitalization, public safety, and affordable housing. Achieved unanimous 2024-25 budget passage via consensus-building approach.
summary.grade_rationale: Early-stage tenure with identified priorities but limited documented delivery on ambitious promises. Budget passage shows competence but housing, safety, downtown outcomes remain preliminary.

promises.normalized: Pass annual municipal budgets without major opposition

data_gaps: Specific measurable targets for downtown revitalization not documented
Public safety improvement metrics and timelines unclear
Affordable housing procurement goals and funding mechanisms not specified
Executive orders issued by Mayor Williams not publicly listed or detailed
Progress reports on 2023 campaign promises not available through sources
Council voting records and policy outcomes beyond budget pass rate unavailable
Details on educator/entrepreneur background and prior policy experience limited
Term end date: sources reference 2025 reelection but two-year term standard unclear
